market_overview.headline: Market showing divergent signals with SPY in bull pullback mode while tech remains unstable and Bitcoin in full bear structure.
market_overview.detail: SPY signals 'Bull Pullback → 21W' but faces crossover risks, QQQ shows 'Bullish (unstacked)' with potential 8W/13W bullish cross, while BTC remains in 'Full Bear' down 19% from 21W EMA creating risk-off undertones.

momentum_themes.headline: Momentum Acceleration
momentum_themes.detail: Electronic technology and financial sectors dominating momentum rankings with semiconductor equipment and memory stocks leading. Energy minerals showing perfect bullish participation while tech infrastructure plays accelerate.

sector_analysis.headline: Sector Rotation Dynamics

strongest.note: Perfect bullish participation with all 9 names in bull structure
Complete sector strength with no bearish names
Mining and materials showing uniform bullish structure

weakest.note: Complete sector weakness with all names in bearish structure
Severe tech services weakness with 91% of names bearish
Consumer discretionary pressure with luxury goods leading weakness

sector_analysis.detail: Clear rotation from growth tech into cyclical value with energy and materials dominating. Technology services experiencing broad-based weakness while infrastructure plays within electronic technology hold up better.

items.text: SPY showing bearish crossover risks with both 8W/13W and 13W/21W spreads compressing
Technology services sector in severe distress with 91% bearish participation including MSFT, CRM, ORCL
Bitcoin full bear structure creating crypto contagion risk and broader risk-off sentiment
Large-cap tech names like NVDA, AAPL showing crossover risks despite current strength
